_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored) and edit for your machine. List one node per physical device — sibling HID interfaces (Consumer/System Control, where keys like Calculator live) are pulled in automatically. Run with no transport to see device names.
devices: Dell Computer Corp Dell Universal Receiver
_mqtt_comment: Optional. Set broker to connect to Home Assistant: publishes MQTT discovery (a 'KVM grab' switch + 'Bridge link' sensor) and lets HA toggle the grab — in addition to the local toggleKey. Omit/empty broker to disable. nodeID/clientID default to the hostname.
